name: HIKEN SUZUME KENJUTSU: KOUJAKU KENBOU (SECRET SPARROW SWORD ART: SPARROW ' S PLOY )

description.value:
Type: Taijutsu (Strike)

Rank: 5

Chakra Cost: 3

Learn DC: 16 | Successes: 2

Perform: 8 | Perform DC: 16

Components: C, F, M, P

The first of the techniques to tie together Hiken Suzume and the Shinmei Ryu school, this technique is an effective retaliation against a foe, though it should be reserved for single opponents, as the user is left completely open. This technique may only be used after the user has been struck in melee. As part of this technique the user makes a melee attack against the target with his held weapon, against which the target is flat-footed. If this attack hits the user deals normal damage and may start a grapple without provoking an attack of opportunity.

The target may attempt to escape from the grapple as normal, but takes a -2 penalty from the unusual method of restraint and the pain of pulling the blade free. The user may deal damage with his held weapon as normal and while grappling the target, the user takes a -2 penalty to AC in addition to the normal penalties for grappling.

Requires: Fuku Ejiki (3)

Material Focus: A bladed weapon.
